channel.title: Clean Code on kencho51
channel.description: Recent content in Clean Code on kencho51

item.title: Learn, todo and done 4-8/1/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Google Chrome Developer Tools, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Todo Add citation button #83 3.1 Remove html entities from Text return Done - Project Look into Publons API access -Created an account -Get the API token: c49ee6b0ddac5cabd4340fe77c3f2034dc54668e Done Ready for final review, Allow other web sites to make link previews #513

item.title: Learn, todo and done 21-25/12/20
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Todo - Project repo, doc Look into Publons API access Todo Allow other web sites to make link previews #513 1.1 Add Open Graph meta-tags 1.2 Add Twitter meta-tags 1.3 Add HTML meta-tags 1.4 Pass the behat test Add citation button #83 3.1 Remove html entities from Text return Done Add hypothesis metadata schema

item.title: Learn, todo and done 14-18/12/20
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Todo - Project repo, doc Look into Publons API access Todo Add citation button #83 1.1 Click Text and return with html entities Alnasir, J., &amp; Shanahan, H. (2015). <i>Supporting scripts and data for "Investigation into the annotation of protocol sequencing steps in the Sequence Read Archive"</i> [Data set]. GigaScience Database. https://doi.org/10.5524/100142 Done - Project Done Look into Allow other web sites to make link previews #513 Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 7-11/12/20
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Todo - Project repo Test sandbox DataCite API to mint DOIs using peer review metadata Look into Publons API access Todo Done - Project Add safe guard steps: 1.1 Only process status === ok 1.2 Return DOI with status 1.3 Solve php warning issue illegal string offset "items" 1.4 Allow command line input of excel file

item.title: Learn, todo and done 30/11-4/12/20
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Todo - Project repo Test sandbox DataCite API to mint DOIs using peer review metadata Look into Publons API access Todo Add citation button #83 1.1 To pass the behat test for RIS and BibTeX citation, which will have files downloaded Done Add hypothesis metadata schema 1.1 Add fullDOI function in CController.php 1.2 Pass the behat test for meta tag inside head tag

item.title: Learn, todo and done 2-6/11/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Add column to external link table #61 Todo - Project repo To start a new project Publon DOI, user story 1.1 Dataflow diagram 1.2 How to parse excel file 1.2 Read API documents 1.3 Access all the Publon, DataCite and CorssRef API Done Finish the behat test for Add hypothesis metadata schema 1.1 Using xpath to find the meta element and assert attribute name and content at the same time Add citation button #83

item.title: Learn, todo and done 27-30/10/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Todo - Project repo To start a new project Publon DOI, user story 1.1 Dataflow diagram 1.2 Read API documents 1.3 Access all the Publon, DataCite and CorssRef API Done Follow up PR Add-delete-button-#457 1.1 Run unit test against test database gigadb_unit_tests Follow up PR Remove publisher option in admin page-#381 2.1 Implemented I should not see a form element labelled Finish the behat test for Add hypothesis metadata schema

item.title: Learn, todo and done 19-23/10/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo Todo - Project To start a new project Publon DOI, user story 1.1 Dataflow diagram 1.2 Read API documents 1.3 Access all the Publon, DataCite and CorssRef API Done Follow up PR Add-delete-button-#457 1.1 Factor out common code into static method in CurationLog.php 1.2 Finished the unit test of curationLogEntryFactory function 1.3 Finished datasetLogEntryFactory and createDatasetLogEntry function and passed the unit tests Follow up PR Add Hypothes.

item.title: Learn, todo and done 12-16/10/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo - Github issue Follow up PR Add-delete-button-#457 Study Add link preview #61, Link previews #428 2.1 Start with Add the metadata schema on dataset page to allow Hypothesis to parse citation DOI #85 2.2 Then Add the metadata schema on dataset page to allow other web sites to make link previews of our web site #513

item.title: Learn, todo and done 5-9/10/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo To start a new project Publon DOI, user story Done Merged and closed Change wip to ok #511 Follow up PR Add-delete-button-#457 2.1 Update feature file 2.2 Create EntryLog.php component class to log createNewEntry event 2.3 Try to create component services for curation log and dataset log which are not needed 2.4 To add static function in models/CurationLog.

item.title: Learn, todo and done 28/9-2/10/20

item.title: Learn, todo and done 21-24/9/20
item.description: Learn Yii2 JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Todo To start a new project, user story Done Merged PR Delete button #503 Closed and merged PR Pagination #495 Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 14-18/9/20
item.description: Learn JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Learning progress Finished 80% of Java Algorithm and Data Structure Certification. Todo Finish no ability to remove file attributes #457 Done Follow up PR Pagination #495 Update the pressEnterKey to detectEnterKeyPress Clean up the dataset-view.feature For PR Delete button #503 Create actionDeleteAttr in the controller class for the delete function Create a Delete button in the _form file of view class that calls js-delete function Create a js-delete function that calls action deleteAttr and add window.

item.title: Learn, todo and done 7-11/9/20
item.description: Learn JavaScript, FCC CSS, FCC Clean Code, YouTube Learning progress Finished 75% of Responsive Web Design Certification Finished 70% of Java Algorithm and Data Structure Certification. Todo Done Follow up PR View files from large db #437 Create a more generic I hit return behat scenario. Remove commented codes. Delete PhantomJS dependence and update chrome browser window size to window-size=1024,768 Follow up no ability to remove file attributes #457 Update actionUpdate, but get Error 500 Trying to get property of non-object error.

item.title: Learn, todo and done 31/8-4/9-20

Using xpath variable, Return key was simulated Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 3-7/8/20
item.description: Learn To study Clean Code Study the gigaDB codebase BDD TDD Todo Issue View files from large db #437 Issue Replace unicode character #276 Help PR PostgreSQL set up using CSV #469 Done Merged PR Add Col pop up text to tables #473 Problem Issue #185, protected/views/dataset/view.php file in the production server doesn’t look like the file that Ken has updated Issue #462, the code on the develop branch being out of sync with the code on the production server.
